title: Principal Engineer, Engineering
description:
Main Responsibilities:

• Prepare and review technical specifications and procurement data sheets for instrumentation valves at the Singapore site.

• Review engineering technical requirements and technical drawings for PCS/BMS/GMS automation systems and related instruments; lead technical communication with suppliers.

• Organize and chair professional reviews of instrumentation and electrical (I&E) construction drawings, record issues, and ensure accurate information dissemination to relevant departments and personnel.

• Participate in technical discussions and evaluation processes with suppliers of key equipment such as instrumentation valves, providing professional technical support for final supplier selection.

• Plan and optimize the overall instrumentation valve installation schedule, streamline installation processes, and control key milestones.

• Oversee the progress and quality control of instrumentation installation projects, ensuring strict adherence to design drawings, installation specifications, and quality standards.

• Research, evaluate, and promote applicable new technologies and processes during instrumentation construction.

• Review and optimize factory acceptance testing (FAT) and site acceptance testing (SAT) documents related to instrumentation projects, and establish/optimize execution procedures.

• Conduct electrical and instrument loop tests, trial runs, and commissioning, diagnosing and resolving various technical issues encountered during commissioning.

• Calculate, analyze, and summarize costs related to instrumentation valve installations in the Singapore site's instrumentation projects.

• Optimize the instrumentation materials supply process to effectively control project construction costs.

• Introduce mature instrumentation technologies and experiences related to API production from the China headquarters to the Singapore site and facilitate their gradual implementation.


Competencies:

• Bachelor's degree or higher.

• Background in Chemical Engineering or related process disciplines.

• Proficient in reading and writing in both English and Chinese, capable of fluent technical communication with both the local Singapore team and the technical team in China.

• Good proficiency in office software operations.

• Over 20 years of experience in instrumentation design, construction, and commissioning.

• Strong planning, summarizing, communication, and coordination skills.

• Ability to make independent judgments and solve problems.

• Proficient in verbal and written communication.

• Skilled in using MS Office software and CAD.

• Strong logical analysis abilities, capable of quickly assessing and managing situations.

• Strong time management skills, with a planned approach to work.

• Clear cost awareness, with the ability to handle significant work pressure.
